ruleset_version: Regelverk 2 - Operativt verifieringsregelverk för Certificate of Origin

certificate.label: Document A
certificate.quality_notes: High quality text-based PDF. Two pages: page 1 is ORIGINAL, page 2 is COPY. Both are identical in content. Using ORIGINAL (page 1) for verification.

invoice.label: Document B
invoice.quality_notes: High quality text-based PDF. Contains 9 pages, each a separate invoice (F549422 through F549430) all issued by AB Regin to Regin Controls Otomasyon Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S., all dated 2026-03-03.

lc_check.lc_validation_reasoning: No Letter of Credit reference found in the certificate. The certificate number is SEG-26D-466404 which does not contain any LC banking term. No field labeled 'L/C', 'Letter of Credit', 'Documentary Credit' or similar exists in the certificate.

locations_found: Every invoice page (pages 1-9) footer: 'AB Regin, Box 116, SE-428 22 Kållered, Sweden'
Every invoice page header area contains REGIN branding/logo
Each invoice is issued by AB Regin as the seller/exporter

document_pairing.method: Certificate references invoices F549422-F549430. Invoice file contains exactly these 9 invoices (F549422 on page 1, F549423 on page 2, F549424 on page 3, F549425 on page 4, F549426 on page 5, F549427 on page 6, F549428 on page 7, F549429 on page 8, F549430 on page 9). All invoices are from the same issuer (AB Regin) to the same consignee (Regin Controls Otomasyon Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S.), all dated 2026-03-03. Certificate explicitly references 'According to the attached invoices F549422-F549430 dated 2026-03-03'. All 9 invoices are part of the verification set.

pairing_validation_rule_8_6.reasoning: Certificate references F549422-F549430, all found in invoice file. Consignor AB Regin is the issuer of all invoices. Consignee Regin Controls Otomasyon Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. is the invoice/delivery addressee on all invoices.

All invoice pages, Invoice address block

candidates.raw_text: X1176 (Sweden), IO-A28MIXW-3-BEM (Sweden), IO-EC16DOE-X (Sweden), IO-EC32DIB-X (Sweden), IO-EC16UID-X (Sweden), XCA283W-4 (Sweden), TTC25 (Sweden), PULSER-X/D (Sweden), XCA283W-4 (Sweden), IO-EC16UID-X (Sweden)
The exporter of the products covered by this document (customs authorization No. SE/Gbg/001899) declares that, except where otherwise clearly indicated, these products are of EU preferential origin.

checkpoints.certificate_value: AB Regin, Box 116, SE-428 22, KÅLLERED, Sweden
checkpoints.invoice_value: AB Regin, Box 116, SE-428 22 Kållered, Sweden

comparison_steps.description: Search for consignor name 'AB Regin' in all invoice pages.
comparison_steps.reasoning: AB Regin is explicitly identified as the issuer/seller on every invoice page (footer: 'AB Regin, Box 116, SE-428 22 Kållered, Sweden'). The name is an exact match.

comparison_steps.description: Verify country Sweden.
comparison_steps.reasoning: Certificate states 'Sweden'. Invoice footer states 'Sweden'. VAT number prefix 'SE' in SE556414545501 also confirms Sweden. IBAN prefix SE confirms Sweden.

rules_applied.description: Koncernstruktur - consignor name found explicitly in invoice

checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate consignor 'AB Regin' in Sweden matches exactly with invoice issuer 'AB Regin' in Sweden (footer on all pages). Address also matches: Box 116, SE-428 22 Kållered. Direct match, no normalization needed beyond case.

checkpoints.certificate_value: Regin Controls Otomasyon Sanayi ve, Atatürk Mah. 2. Cadde No: 2/1, 34758 Atatürk / Istanbul, Türkiye
checkpoints.invoice_value: Regin Controls Otomasyon Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S., Atatürk Mah. 2. Cadde No: 2/1, 34758 Atatürk / Istanbul, Turkey

comparison_steps.description: Identify primary invoicing field. All invoices have an 'Invoice address' field with 'Regin Controls Otomasyon Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S.'
comparison_steps.reasoning: Invoice address field is the primary consignee field per 4.2.0.2.

comparison_steps.description: Compare certificate consignee name with invoice consignee name.
comparison_steps.reasoning: Certificate: 'Regin Controls Otomasyon Sanayi ve'. Invoice: 'Regin Controls Otomasyon Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S.' The certificate name appears truncated - it ends after 've' while the invoice continues with 'Ticaret A.S.' This looks like a layout truncation in the certificate.

comparison_steps.description: Check if certificate name is a layout-truncated prefix of invoice name.
comparison_steps.reasoning: Certificate text 'Regin Controls Otomasyon Sanayi ve' is an exact prefix of invoice text 'Regin Controls Otomasyon Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S.' The truncation occurs at the end of the consignee field in the certificate, which is a typical layout/field size limitation. The text ends mid-way through the full company name. No other entity with similar name exists in the invoice. Land matches (Türkiye/Turkey). All conditions of 4.1.3.2/4.2.2.1.1 are met.

comparison_steps.description: Verify country.
comparison_steps.reasoning: Certificate states 'Türkiye'. Invoice states 'Turkey'. These are the same country (Türkiye is the official Turkish name for Turkey). Normalization allows this.

rules_applied.description: Layout truncation in certificate - certificate name is exact prefix of invoice name
Land matches: Türkiye = Turkey (same country, different language forms)

checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate consignee 'Regin Controls Otomasyon Sanayi ve' is a layout-truncated prefix of invoice consignee 'Regin Controls Otomasyon Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S.' The missing part 'Ticaret A.S.' consists of a Turkish business activity word ('Ticaret' = trade/commerce) and legal form ('A.S.' = Anonim Şirketi). The truncation is due to field length limitation in the certificate. Address matches exactly: Atatürk Mah. 2. Cadde No: 2/1, 34758 Atatürk / Istanbul. Country Türkiye = Turkey. MATCH via layout truncation rule 4.2.2.1.1.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: MISMATCH because certificate name differs from invoice name
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: Certificate name is an exact prefix truncated by layout. Rule 4.2.2.1.1 explicitly allows this. Address and country match, no other entity with similar name exists.

checkpoints.certificate_value: Thermometers, Electronic modules, Thermostat electronics. According to the attached invoices F549422-F549430 dated 2026-03-03
checkpoints.invoice_value: Invoices F549422-F549430, dated 2026-03-03. Articles include: Duct sensors (TG-K330, TG-K360), Connection units (X1176), Expansion units (IO-A28MIXW-3-BEM, IO-EC16DOE-X, IO-EC32DIB-X, IO-EC16UID-X), EXOcompact units (XCA283W-4), Electrical heating controllers (TTC25, PULSER-X/D), Clamp-on sensors (TG-AH4/PT1000, TG-A1/PT1000), Fan-coil controllers (RCFD-230C)

comparison_steps.description: Certificate contains generell varubeskrivning ('Thermometers, Electronic modules, Thermostat electronics') with explicit reference to attached invoices F549422-F549430 dated 2026-03-03.
comparison_steps.reasoning: Certificate states 'According to the attached invoices F549422-F549430 dated 2026-03-03'. This is an explicit invoice reference per 4.3.5. All 9 invoices (F549422 through F549430) are present in the invoice file, all dated 2026-03-03. The certificate's generell description ('Thermometers, Electronic modules, Thermostat electronics') is a high-level category description. The invoices contain: sensors/thermometers (TG-K330, TG-K360, TG-AH4/PT1000, TG-A1/PT1000 = thermometers), electronic modules/controllers (IO-A28MIXW-3-BEM, IO-EC16DOE-X, IO-EC32DIB-X, IO-EC16UID-X, XCA283W-4, X1176 = electronic modules), and thermostat/heating electronics (TTC25, PULSER-X/D, RCFD-230C = thermostat electronics). The invoice content is consistent with the certificate's general description. Invoice numbers match: F549422 through F549430. Invoice date matches: 2026-03-03. Expression 'According to the attached invoices' constitutes an explicit invoice reference.

comparison_steps.description: Verify that each referenced invoice number exists in the invoice file.
comparison_steps.reasoning: F549422 (p1), F549423 (p2), F549424 (p3), F549425 (p4), F549426 (p5), F549427 (p6), F549428 (p7), F549429 (p8), F549430 (p9). Note: invoice file uses format 'F 549422' with a space, but after normalization of whitespace this matches 'F549422'. All dates are 2026-03-03.

comparison_steps.description: Check if invoice content is consistent with certificate description.
comparison_steps.reasoning: Certificate describes 'Thermometers, Electronic modules, Thermostat electronics'. Invoices contain temperature sensors (thermometers), electronic control/expansion units (electronic modules), and heating/fan-coil controllers (thermostat electronics). The general categories cover the specific products. No articles in the invoices are inconsistent with these categories.

rules_applied.description: Generell varubeskrivning with explicit invoice reference - all invoices F549422-F549430 found, dated 2026-03-03, content consistent

checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate uses generell varubeskrivning 'Thermometers, Electronic modules, Thermostat electronics' with explicit reference 'According to the attached invoices F549422-F549430 dated 2026-03-03'. Per rule 4.3.5, this is verified by confirming: (1) the expression 'According to the attached invoices' is an explicit invoice reference, (2) all invoice numbers F549422-F549430 are found in the invoice file (with minor whitespace normalization 'F 549422' → 'F549422'), (3) all invoices are dated 2026-03-03, (4) invoice content (sensors, electronic modules, controllers) is consistent with the general description. No article numbers are separately listed in the certificate, so Prioritet 1 (article number check) does not apply. MATCH.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: MISMATCH because certificate description is too general
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: Rule 4.3.5 explicitly allows generell varubeskrivning when combined with an explicit invoice reference and matching date. The invoice content is consistent with the description.

checkpoints.certificate_value: 214,845 kg NW (box 7); also 2 pallets, gw 386 kg, nw 214,845 kg (box 6)
checkpoints.invoice_value: Per-row weights across 9 invoices (no total weight rows). Sum of all row NW: see calculation below.

comparison_steps.description: Box 7 contains '214,845 kg NW'. This is the verification-basis quantity per rule 4.4.2.1.
comparison_steps.reasoning: Box 7 explicitly states '214,845 kg NW'. This is a weight with category (NW) and unit (kg). Per 4.4.2.1, box 7 value is always the verification basis.

comparison_steps.description: Search for 214.845 kg NW in invoice file.
comparison_steps.reasoning: No single invoice contains a total NW of 214.845 kg. No total weight row exists on any invoice. The invoices contain per-row weights without totals.

comparison_steps.description: Check conditions for exception 3A.
comparison_steps.result: Not applicable - no total rows on invoices
comparison_steps.reasoning: Exception 3A requires 'Endast fakturornas uttryckliga totalrader'. None of the 9 invoices contain a total weight row. Each invoice only lists per-article weights. Per 4.4.5.2.2: 'Om någon faktura saknar totalrad → MISMATCH'. Therefore 3A cannot be used directly. Proceeding to next exception.

comparison_steps.description: Check if unit conversion is needed.
comparison_steps.reasoning: Both certificate and invoices use kg. No conversion needed.

comparison_steps.description: Check if 3C applies.
comparison_steps.reasoning: Certificate does not specify weight per piece. 3C does not apply.

comparison_steps.step: 4.4.5.5 Undantag 3D (Summering av flera rader inom samma faktura)
comparison_steps.description: Check if 3D applies.
comparison_steps.result: Not applicable for total across invoices
comparison_steps.reasoning: 3D applies within a single invoice. Certificate total spans 9 invoices.

comparison_steps.step: 4.4.5.6 Undantag 3E (Summering av radvikter när totalrad saknas)
comparison_steps.description: Check conditions for exception 3E. Certificate references invoices F549422-F549430 with explicit date. All rows have weight values with numeric value. All weights are in same implicit unit context. Sum rows across all 9 invoices.
comparison_steps.reasoning: 4.4.5.6.1 Fakturareferens: Certificate explicitly references F549422-F549430 dated 2026-03-03 - SATISFIED. 4.4.5.6.2 Viktangivelse per rad: Each article row has 'Weight: X.XX' - all have numeric values. However, no explicit unit is stated on each row (just 'Weight: 1.52' etc.). The invoices use amounts in EUR and weights appear unitless on rows. However, the certificate states NW in kg. Looking at per-row weights: these weights (0.032 kg to 73.6 kg) are clearly in kg given the context of electronic modules and sensors. All rows use same format. 4.4.5.6.3 Same unit on all rows - yes, all appear to be kg. 4.4.5.6.4 Only article rows, excluding freight/packing. 4.4.5.6.5 Viktkategori: Certificate states NW. Invoices do not specify GW/NW per row - just 'Weight'. However per 4.4.5.6.5: weights can be used when no other weight category exists and nothing contradicts. The invoices only state one weight per row without GW/NW distinction.

comparison_steps.description: Sum all per-row weights across all 9 invoices.
Compare summed weight with certificate NW.
comparison_steps.reasoning: Summed per-row weights = 214.845 kg. Certificate NW = 214.845 kg. Difference = 0. Within tolerance (±0.1% = 0.214845 kg). MATCH.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate also states GW 386 kg in box 6. Check if invoices contain contradicting GW.
comparison_steps.reasoning: Invoices do not contain any GW values. Per-row weights are unspecified category. No total GW in any invoice. Since invoices do not explicitly state GW values, there is no explicit contradiction. Per 4.4.3.1, the GW value cannot be verified but is also not contradicted. Since NW is already verified as MATCH via 3E, and GW is neither confirmed nor contradicted, the overall quantity check is MATCH per 4.4.3.1 (at least one verified, no explicit contradiction on the other).

rules_applied.description: Box 7 value (214,845 kg NW) is the verification-basis quantity
Exception 3E - Summation of per-row weights when no total row exists. Sum = 214.845 kg = certificate 214.845 kg NW. EXACT MATCH.
At least one quantity verified (NW). GW not contradicted (no GW in invoices).

checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate box 7 states 214,845 kg NW. No single total weight exists in invoices. Applied Exception 3E: summed all per-row weights across all 9 invoices. F549422: 1.52+0.76=2.28; F549423: 1.114; F549424: 2.82+2.5+3.75+4.485+14.35=27.905; F549425: 1.114; F549426: 0.87; F549427: 20.86+72.6=93.46; F549428: 0.032; F549429: 11.48+2.99=14.47; F549430: 73.6. Total = 214.845 kg. EXACT MATCH with certificate NW 214.845 kg. GW 386 kg from box 6 cannot be verified against invoices (no GW values) but is not contradicted either. Per 4.4.3.1, at least one quantity (NW) is verified as MATCH, and no explicit contradiction on GW → overall MATCH.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: MISMATCH because no total weight row exists in any invoice
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: Exception 3E explicitly allows summation of per-row weights when total rows are absent. All 3E conditions are met.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: MISMATCH because per-row weights lack explicit unit
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: Per 4.4.5.6.5, weights without explicit category can be used when no other weight category exists in the invoice and nothing contradicts. The context (electronic components, values in reasonable kg range) and the exact match with certificate NW confirm these are kg values.

checkpoints.invoice_value: China (TG-K330, TG-K360, TG-AH4/PT1000, TG-A1/PT1000, RCFD-230C), Sweden (X1176, IO-A28MIXW-3-BEM, IO-EC16DOE-X, IO-EC32DIB-X, IO-EC16UID-X, XCA283W-4, TTC25, PULSER-X/D). Also EU preferential origin declaration on all invoices.

comparison_steps.description: Search for explicit origin fields in invoices.
comparison_steps.reasoning: Each article row in the invoices contains 'Country of origin: China' or 'Country of origin: Sweden'. Additionally, all invoices contain the declaration 'these products are of EU preferential origin'.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate states 'China' as one of the origins. Check if China is found in invoices.
comparison_steps.reasoning: Multiple articles across invoices F549422, F549426, F549428, F549430 have 'Country of origin: China'. China is explicitly identified in the invoices.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate states 'Sweden' as one of the origins. Check if Sweden is found in invoices.
comparison_steps.reasoning: Multiple articles across invoices F549423, F549424, F549425, F549427, F549429 have 'Country of origin: Sweden'. Sweden is explicitly identified in the invoices.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate contains multiple origins (China, Sweden). Check if origin per article is clear.
comparison_steps.reasoning: Certificate contains explicit reference to invoices ('According to the attached invoices F549422-F549430'). Per 4.3.7, when the certificate contains an explicit invoice reference, the per-article origin can be determined from the invoices. Each invoice row has a clear 'Country of origin' designation. The coupling is unambiguous.

comparison_steps.description: Check for any non-China/non-Sweden origins in invoices.
comparison_steps.reasoning: All articles in the invoices show either 'China' or 'Sweden' as origin. No additional origins exist. Both are covered by the certificate (China, Sweden). Sweden is an EU member state, consistent with the EU preferential origin declaration.

rules_applied.description: Origin fields identified per article row in invoices
Both China and Sweden from certificate explicitly found in invoices
Mixed origins coupling verified via explicit invoice reference

checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate box 3 states 'China, Sweden'. Invoices explicitly state 'Country of origin: China' for sensor products (TG-K330, TG-K360, TG-AH4/PT1000, TG-A1/PT1000, RCFD-230C) and 'Country of origin: Sweden' for electronic module products (X1176, IO-series, XCA283W-4, TTC25, PULSER-X/D). Both origins from the certificate are verified in the invoices. No additional non-certificate origins found in invoices. Per-article origin coupling is established via the explicit invoice reference in the certificate. MATCH.

rule_evaluation_log.outcome: No LC reference found in certificate

rule_evaluation_log.description: Dokumentparning - multiple invoices in invoice file
rule_evaluation_log.outcome: Certificate references F549422-F549430. All 9 invoices found in invoice file. All from same issuer (AB Regin) to same consignee. Using all 9 invoices as the verification set.
PASSED. Criterion 1: invoice references match. Criterion 2: consignor AB Regin identified in all invoices. Criterion 3: consignee identified in all invoices.
MATCH - AB Regin found as issuer on all invoice pages
MATCH - certificate name is exact prefix of invoice name, truncation due to field limitation
MATCH - invoice reference verified, content consistent
Not applicable - invoices lack total weight rows (required by 4.4.5.2.2)
Not applicable - same unit (kg) in both documents
Not applicable - certificate does not state per-piece weight
Not applicable - quantity spans multiple invoices

rule_evaluation_log.description: Exception 3E - Summering av radvikter när totalrad saknas
rule_evaluation_log.outcome: MATCH - sum of all per-row weights = 214.845 kg, exactly matching certificate NW 214.845 kg
Not needed - certificate does not state EU as origin, states China and Sweden specifically
Verified via explicit invoice reference - each article in invoices has designated origin

overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontrollpunkter stämmer överens. Avsändaren AB Regin i Sverige kan verifieras som fakturautställare. Mottagaren Regin Controls Otomasyon Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. i Turkiet identifieras i fakturorna (certifikatets namn är avkortat på grund av fältbegränsning). Varubeskrivningen är generell men stöds av verifierade fakturareferenser (F549422-F549430). Nettovikten 214,845 kg stämmer exakt med summan av alla artikelvikter i de nio fakturorna. Ursprungsländerna Kina och Sverige bekräftas per artikel i fakturorna.
overall_assessment.consolidation_reasoning: All 5 checkpoints (consignor, consignee, goods description, quantity, country of origin) result in MATCH. Consignor: exact match. Consignee: layout truncation in certificate accepted per 4.2.2.1.1. Goods description: generell varubeskrivning with verified invoice reference per 4.3.5. Quantity: NW 214.845 kg verified via 3E summation (exact match). Origin: China and Sweden both explicitly found in invoices per article. No MISMATCH or MANUAL_REVIEW on any checkpoint. Therefore comparison_result = IDENTICAL.

human_readable_report.title: Verifieringsrapport – Certificate of Origin mot faktura

sections.certificate_value: AB Regin, Box 116, SE-428 22, KÅLLERED, Sweden
sections.invoice_value: AB Regin, Box 116, SE-428 22 Kållered, Sweden
sections.rule_applied: Consignor identifierad som fakturautställare på samtliga fakturor. Namn och land matchar exakt.
sections.motivation: Certifikatets consignor 'AB Regin' i Sverige identifieras direkt som utställare av samtliga 9 fakturor. Företagsnamn, postadress och land överensstämmer.

sections.certificate_value: Regin Controls Otomasyon Sanayi ve, Atatürk Mah. 2. Cadde No: 2/1, 34758 Atatürk / Istanbul, Türkiye
sections.invoice_value: Regin Controls Otomasyon Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S., Atatürk Mah. 2. Cadde No: 2/1, 34758 Atatürk / Istanbul, Turkey
sections.rule_applied: Layoutavkortning i certifikatet accepterad. Certifikatets namn utgör exakt prefix av fakturans fullständiga namn. Adress och land matchar.
sections.motivation: Certifikatets consignee 'Regin Controls Otomasyon Sanayi ve' är en exakt inledande del av fakturans 'Regin Controls Otomasyon Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S.' De saknade orden 'Ticaret A.S.' (verksamhetsord + bolagsform) beror uppenbart på fältbegränsning i certifikatet. Adress matchar exakt. Land: Türkiye = Turkey (samma land).

sections.certificate_value: Thermometers, Electronic modules, Thermostat electronics. According to the attached invoices F549422-F549430 dated 2026-03-03
sections.invoice_value: 9 fakturor (F549422-F549430) daterade 2026-03-03 innehållande sensorer, elektroniska moduler och styrenheter
sections.rule_applied: Generell varubeskrivning med explicit fakturareferens godkänd. Alla refererade fakturor finns, datum matchar, innehåll överensstämmer.
sections.motivation: Certifikatet hänvisar uttryckligen till fakturorna F549422-F549430 daterade 2026-03-03 ('According to the attached invoices'). Alla 9 fakturor finns i fakturaunderlaget med korrekt datum. Fakturornas innehåll (temperatursensorer, elektroniska moduler, styrelektronik) överensstämmer med certifikatets generella beskrivning.

sections.invoice_value: Summa av alla radvikter: 214,845 kg (beräknat via undantag 3E)
sections.rule_applied: Undantag 3E – Summering av radvikter när totalrad saknas. Summan av alla artikelvikter i 9 fakturor = 214,845 kg, exakt lika med certifikatets NW.
sections.motivation: Certifikatets box 7 anger 214,845 kg NW. Ingen faktura innehåller en totalviktsrad. Summering av samtliga radvikter enligt undantag 3E: F549422=2,28 + F549423=1,114 + F549424=27,905 + F549425=1,114 + F549426=0,87 + F549427=93,46 + F549428=0,032 + F549429=14,47 + F549430=73,6 = 214,845 kg. Exakt överensstämmelse.

sections.invoice_value: Country of origin: China (sensorer, fan-coil controllers), Country of origin: Sweden (elektroniska moduler, styrenheter)
sections.rule_applied: Varje ursprungsland i certifikatet identifierat per artikel i fakturorna. Koppling vara-ursprung verifierad via fakturareferens.
sections.motivation: Certifikatet anger 'China, Sweden' som ursprungsländer. Fakturorna anger 'Country of origin: China' för sensorer (TG-K330, TG-K360, TG-AH4/PT1000, TG-A1/PT1000) och fan-coil controller (RCFD-230C), samt 'Country of origin: Sweden' för elektroniska moduler och styrenheter (X1176, IO-serien, XCA283W-4, TTC25, PULSER-X/D). Båda ursprungsländerna verifierade.
